portfolio_summary: Moderately bullish portfolio with selective positioning across 4 of 7 tickers. Long financials (JPM + GS, both showing perfect EMA alignment and accelerating momentum) and long tech growth (QQQ, strongest momentum in basket). Short consumer discretionary via NKE (structural fundamental breakdown, clear downtrend across all timeframes). Holding TSLA (no consensus), XOM (conflicted signals), and SPY (extreme overbought, poor risk-reward). Total long exposure ~$43,100 across JPM/GS/QQQ; short exposure ~$9,400 in NKE. Net long bias reflecting the underlying uptrend, hedged by one short in a fundamentally deteriorating name. Risk concentrations managed: JPM/GS correlation reduced via smaller GS size; SPY/QQQ positions not doubled up. Market view: financial sector and tech momentum remain intact near-term, but extreme overbought readings on broad indices (SPY RSI 90.6, QQQ Z-score 2.50) warrant caution — active trades carry tight stops.
